sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.05: Fix booking edit room dropdown availability and add room line action.
  • 1.8.8.04: Centralize CRM room resolution for remaining migration and booking flows.
  • 1.8.8.03: Move booking edit room handling to CRM room ids and centralize room number mapping.
